app.name: FIFA Control Room
app.subtitle: React 19, Web3 wallet access, charting, i18n, and state management all wired together.

dashboard.title: A production-oriented React + Web3 starter
dashboard.description: This starter pairs route-driven UI, cached data fetching, wallet onboarding, and a chart workspace so feature work can start immediately.
dashboard.missingProjectId: Add VITE_REOWN_PROJECT_ID to enable Reown AppKit wallet connections.
dashboard.walletInfoDescription: Current BNB Smart Chain session and wallet metadata.
dashboard.walletConnectHint: Use Reown AppKit to connect an EVM wallet on BNB Smart Chain.

chart.title: Cross-chain traffic
chart.description: Query-backed mock data rendered through ECharts.

playground.title: Integration playground
playground.description: Use this page as the landing zone for feature modules, contract flows, and app settings.

items.router: React Router is ready for nested pages and feature routes.
items.query: TanStack Query + Axios are configured for cached API access.
items.wallet: Reown AppKit, Wagmi, Viem, and Ethers are installed for wallet and contract flows.
items.i18n: i18next loads locale files through HTTP backend with browser language detection.
items.state: Zustand is available for UI-level client state.
items.motion: Motion is available for page transitions and interface animation.
